title: Al Khawr Heat Wave
lead: Al Khawr is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.43. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Al Khawr are characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 39%, and the wind speed is 17.4 km/h, offering little relief from the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has resulted in 0.0 GG of Heating Degree Days (HDD), indicating no need for heating during this period.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
